welcome.title: Welcome to ChefIApp
welcome.subtitle: In 3 steps you're selling. No complex setups.
welcome.trialInfo: 14 days free · No commitment · Cancel anytime

error.invalidRestaurantId: The restaurant identifier is not valid.

product.title: First product (optional)
product.subtitle: You can add a product or continue without adding one.
product.noRestaurant: Restaurant not found. Create a restaurant on the start screen and come back.

error.noRestaurant: Restaurant not found. Go back to start.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Where is your restaurant located?
location.cityPlaceholder: e.g. Sant Josep de sa Talaia
location.capacityHelper: Based on capacity, {{count}} tables will be created automatically

payments.comingSoon: Coming soon: enable/disable methods (cash, card, MB Way) and link terminals.
payments.description: You don't need to do anything here for now. The POS continues to accept payments as configured in operation.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: Add manager and staff to your restaurant

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Set opening hours by day of the week

publish.title: Publish Restaurant
publish.subtitle: Review everything and activate your restaurant
publish.whatHappens2: First test order is created automatically
publish.whatHappens4: You will be redirected to the Dashboard
publish.coreOffline: Core unavailable. Start Core to publish.
publish.completeSectionsHint: Complete all required sections before publishing
publish.completeAllAlert: Complete all required sections before publishing.
publish.accessDescription: These are the operating system modules. Some may be locked until publication.

fiveMin.promise: In less than 5 minutes, your restaurant will be ready to sell. This used to take days.

intro.headline: Setting up a restaurant used to take days. Now it takes less than 5 minutes.

location.headline: Where and how to reach you

shiftSetup.headline: Shift and register
shiftSetup.description: Each workday starts with an open shift and initial register. When you close the shift, the system handles cash closing. Set the default suggested opening amount here (pre-fills daily; you can change it later).

tpvPreview.headline: POS — Preview
tpvPreview.message: This is an example. Real sales start when you open the shift.
tpvPreview.summaryText: Summary of what you configured: identity, location, and daily profile. Below you see the table map and POS preview.

planTrial.headline: Active trial
planTrial.subtitle: Your trial is active. You can choose a plan whenever you like; until then, use the system freely.

ritual.headline: Your restaurant is ready.
ritual.message: When you open the shift, sales will be real.
ritual.caixaLabel: How much cash do you have today?
ritual.errorTerms: Accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue.
ritual.errorInvalidId: The restaurant identifier is not valid. Go back to the Identity step and create the restaurant (name, type, country).
ritual.errorCoreUnavailable: Could not open the shift. Check the Core connection (Docker on 3001) and try again.
ritual.errorShiftFailed: Could not open the shift. Try again.
